stories.title: At the Store
stories.text: I went to the store yesterday. I bought bread, milk, and two apples.

stories.title: Bus Ride
stories.text: I take the bus to school every day. I usually sit by the window and listen to music.

stories.title: Rainy Afternoon
stories.text: It rained all afternoon, so I stayed inside. I read a book and made hot tea for myself.

stories.title: New Teacher
stories.text: Our new teacher arrived on Monday morning. She smiled often and explained the lesson clearly.

stories.title: Cooking Dinner
stories.text: Last night, I cooked dinner for my family. Everyone liked the rice, vegetables, and chicken soup.

stories.title: My Small Job
stories.text: I work in a small shop near my house. I help customers find simple things. I like the job because people are friendly.

stories.title: Moving Day
stories.text: Last month, my family moved to a new apartment. At first, I felt nervous about the change. The streets were different, and I did not know my neighbors. After one week, the place felt more comfortable.

stories.title: Beach Trip
stories.text: Last summer, I went to the beach with my cousins. We woke up early and packed snacks for the drive. The weather was warm, and the water looked beautiful. I collected small shells near the sand. At night, we were tired but very happy.

stories.title: Learning Slowly
stories.text: Learning English has taken time for me. In the beginning, I only knew a few words. Then I started listening more carefully in class. I practiced reading at home every evening. My mistakes still happen, but they happen less often now. That makes me feel proud of my progress.

stories.title: First Day in a New School
stories.text: My first day at a new school was difficult. I entered the classroom and felt very quiet. I did not understand every word around me. One classmate smiled and showed me where to sit. Another student helped me during lunch. By the end of the day, I felt less afraid. I knew the next day would be easier.
